label_mapping: label_index 0..229 maps to space_group 1..230 by space_group = label_index + 1
intensity_normalization: clip negative values to 0, then max-normalize to 0-100
gate_definition: gated_xrd_features = g * xrd_features; gated_phys_features = (1 - g) * phys_features; larger g means stronger CNN/raw-XRD reliance
mc_dropout: Call model.eval(), then set only Dropout modules to train mode; keep BatchNorm in eval mode; average probabilities over stochastic passes.
